message:
feat: Lazy-load VFS — index-only init, demand-page files from R2 on access

Replace preloadFromR2() (loaded ALL files into memory on DO init) with
lazy-load architecture:

- loadIndex(): loads SQLite file index only (paths, sizes, R2 keys) — no
  R2 reads, O(1) memory regardless of workspace size
- path_open: if file exists in index but not in memory, queues it in
  pendingLoads
- Unified replay loop in go-do.ts: after handler returns, checks
  pendingLoads → loads from R2 → replays handler (same pattern as
  multi-fetch two-phase protocol)
- Files loaded on demand stay in memory for DO lifetime (warm cache)
- Handles interleaved file loads + multi-fetch + KV ops in single loop

This bounds DO memory to files actually used per request, not the entire
workspace. Safe under the 128MB worker memory limit.

112 tests passing (4 new R2-backed /data filesystem tests through DO).
